name: Amazon PPC Audit
prompt: Audit the supplied Amazon PPC data. Distinguish facts, hypotheses, and missing data. Return prioritized actions, impact, risk, and measurement plan.

name: TACoS Diagnosis
prompt: Diagnose the TACoS movement using paid sales, organic sales, ad spend, CPC, CTR, CVR, rank, price, promotions, and inventory. Provide a ranked cause tree and tests.

name: SQP Analysis
prompt: Analyze Search Query Performance by funnel stage and recommend the three highest-value actions.

name: Answer Using My Experience
prompt: Use only the supplied Knowledge Vault evidence. Draft a concise first-person answer and flag any claim that lacks a source.

name: Create Notion WBR Entry
prompt: Convert the supplied notes into a WBR with headline, KPI movement, validated drivers, risks, actions/owners/dates, and decisions needed.

name: Find Best Interview Case
prompt: Match the interview question to the supplied Experience Library cases. Choose the strongest case, explain why, and draft a 60-90 second STAR answer without inventing metrics.

name: ACOS/TACoS Diagnostic
prompt: Perform a deep-dive diagnostic on ACOS/TACoS movement. Identify root causes across ad spend efficiency, organic rank, pricing, promotions, and inventory levels. Provide a prioritized cause tree and recommend immediate reversible tests.

name: Daily Pulse Report
prompt: Generate a Daily Pulse report from raw daily metrics. Highlight material changes from yesterday, budget or inventory risks, top 3 immediate priorities, and any escalations requiring management review.

name: WBR Report Generator
prompt: Draft a Weekly Business Review (WBR) entry based on weekly metrics. Include a clear headline, KPI movement vs prior week/target, validated business drivers, risks, and a prioritized action plan with owners and dates.

name: QBR Strategy Builder
prompt: Structure a Quarterly Business Review (QBR). Synthesize monthly/weekly data to show quarterly trends, strategic wins/losses, market share changes, and propose major strategic initiatives and budget allocations for the upcoming quarter.

name: RCA Framework
prompt: Run a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on the supplied issue. Use the 5 Whys method to separate symptoms from underlying system or process failures. Output the confirmed root cause, immediate mitigation, and long-term preventative measures.
